title: Metadata and runtime contracts
outcome: Defined runtime-controller metadata and machine contracts: structured lifecycle entrypoints in unit.schema.json, takogami.descriptor.toml (kind=runtime-controller), graph node-kind enum expansion, Ontarch projection retaining entrypoints+cli, profile [runtime] session_state_home, command-output and runtime-session schemas/fixtures, Rust Serde contracts (ResolvedCommand/PolicyDecision/CommandEnvelope/RuntimeSession), legacy argv parser with deprecation, SHA-256 fingerprints, and state-home precedence. S1 CLI behavior preserved.
validation: moon run takogami:build/test/lint/format-check PASS (35 tests). moon run ontarch:sync PASS (4 units incl. takogami; graph 34/32). moon run ontarch:validate PASS (routing projection + runtime contract fixtures). Cargo.lock excludes banned v0 deps.
decisions: Extend unit.schema.json in place (no split entrypoint.schema.json).
Dotted TOML tables [entrypoints.dev] nested via setpath in descriptor reader.
Keep schema_version 0.1.0; mismatch is typed contract error (exit 3).
Operational state home never falls back to logs.session_log_target; profile fixture under registry/fixtures proves [runtime] projection.
jsonschema as test-only dep for draft-07 fixture validation; sha2 for fingerprints.
blockers: ontarch:secrets-scan detect mode still reports pre-existing age-secret-key in git history (commit a3a4978) — unchanged; out of E09.S2 scope.
token_note: Loaded STATE + E09.S2 + 3 canon refs + 2 session records vs full E09 epic and Plan/bin collection.
